problem: Name on voter card doesn't match Aadhaar
solution: File Form 8 for name correction. Upload your Aadhaar as proof of the correct name. Processing takes 15–30 days.

problem: My name is missing from the electoral roll
solution: Search at voters.eci.gov.in to confirm. If genuinely missing, file Form 6 immediately. On election day, approach the ERO for a Tender Vote.

problem: My voter ID has a very old or blurry photo
solution: File Form 8 for photo correction. Bring a new recent passport-size photograph. The updated card is issued after verification.

problem: I'm registered in two different constituencies
solution: File Form 7 to delete one entry. By law, you can only be registered in one constituency — your current residential address.

problem: Voter ID shows my old address after moving
solution: If within the same constituency, use Form 8A (transposition — fastest option). If you've moved to a new constituency, file Form 7 + Form 6.

problem: My Voter ID card is damaged or torn
solution: Apply for a duplicate EPIC at voters.eci.gov.in. Pay the Rs 25 fee. While waiting, the e-EPIC digital card on the Voter Helpline App is legally valid at booths.
